parents.subject: LU-12187 llite: default FLR EC module params to off

commit.subject: LU-12187 llite: remove version-based EC check
commit.message:
LU-12187 llite: remove version-based EC check

Remove the version-based check for disabling EC by default.
This patch should only land once the main EC functionality
has landed. 

Change-Id: I3b3b3620828cff7940cc9001da69d17b0f8124c7
Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
